features: Podiatrist designed & APMA accepted to promote quality foothealth.
Alleviates pain associated with plantar fasciitis arch pain& heel spurs amongst other foot conditions.
Supports & protects the arch, foot, ankle, knee, &lower back.
parentTitle: PowerStep ProTech Control Orthotic Insoles - Medical Grade Arch Support Inserts for Plantar Fasciitis Relief- Made in USA - Maximum Cushioning + ShockAbsorb Orthotic,
safetyWarning: These insoles are designed to correct overpronation and provide arch relief. They may cause discomfort or irritation if not used correctly or if the user has certain foot conditions. If you have any foot injuries, consult a healthcare professional before use. Do not use if you have a severe foot condition or injury. Follow the sizing instructions carefully to ensure a proper fit. If you experience any pain or discomfort, discontinue use immediately.
title: PowerStep ProTech Control Orthotic Insoles - Medical Grade Arch Support Inserts for Plantar Fasciitis Relief- Made in USA - Maximum Cushioning + ShockAbsorb Orthotic (M 6-6.5 W 8-8.5)
